_README.what: Attainment NARRATIVE for the accolade pop-ups — display prose ONLY.
_README.scope_rule: Joel's scoped exception, 2026-07-16: this file may carry wiki-sourced PROSE. No number, effect, requirement-count or anything the engine consumes may ever come from here. Structurally enforced: the engine's accolade math reads data/accolades.json (client bins, via extract_accolades.py) and never this file; only the pop-up's how-to-acquire text reads it.
_README.ladder: live game (Joel's badge window) > wiki. Any entry here is superseded the moment Joel's in-game pass captures it — see data/accolade_attainment_joel.json.
_README.source_ranking: 1 wiki-hc (Unofficial Homecoming Wiki accolade pages, PRIMARY). 2 forum-guide. 3 forum-4pass. Both forum topic URLs 404'd from this box on 2026-07-16, so every entry below is wiki-hc single-sourced — NOT marked conflict (nothing disagreed), simply single-sourced and upgradeable.
_README.fetch_note: homecoming.wiki returns 403 to cloud egress (Cowork's fetches and the agent fetch tool) but 200 to this Windows box with a browser UA — index AND deep pages. One-time fetch 2026-07-16; never scraped at runtime, never hotlinked.
_README.transcription_note: TRANSCRIBED BY READING, not by link-scrape. The pages present Heroes|Villains as ALTERNATIVE columns (Positron's Ally OR Positron's Betrayer — you earn one, not both) and add an 'Alternate Method' cross-link to the opposite-alignment accolade. An automated scrape flattened all three into one list and produced contaminated chains — e.g. Task Force Commander picked up 'Invader Badge' (the VILLAIN equivalent accolade, not a constituent), Portal Jockey picked up 'Born in Battle', Atlas picked up 'Marshal'. Those were caught before shipping; these entries are the hero-side Traditional Method only.
_README.coverage: 17 of 28 (2026-07-16, Joel: 'transcribe all the rest'). THE JOIN THAT UNLOCKED THE REST: our roster keys are accolade POWER names, while the wiki documents accolade BADGES — and the wiki's own index states the mapping outright ('Archmage — Awards the Eye of the Magus power'), so a power maps to its badge page without any guessing. That is how Eye_of_the_Magus, Demonic_Aura, Long_Range_Teleport, Elusive_Mind etc. became documentable after I had written them off as 'accolade powers with no badge page'.
_README.not_covered: 11 remain undocumented and are NAMED rather than quietly dropped: badge pages returned 404 (Mazebreaker, Super_Patriot), or the roster entry is not a player-earnable accolade at all (Challenge_VanguardDummy_Pet, Crey_CBX-9_Pistol test/temp records). Each keeps the honest placeholder.
_README.alignment_note: Every chain here is the side the accolade is actually awarded on — hero-side for hero accolades, VILLAIN-side for villain accolades (Born In Battle, High Pain Threshold, Marshal, Megalomaniac, Demonic, Force of Nature are villain/rogue). Taking the wrong column would hand a player the opposite faction's to-do list.

Task_Force_Commander.summary: Complete each of the Task Forces given out by the Freedom Phalanx.

badge_chain.tracks: Complete both parts of Positron's Task Force, The Rule of Three
Complete Synapse's Task Force, The Fall of the Clockwork King
Complete Penelope Yin's Task Force, A Clamor for the People
Complete Citadel's Task Force, Citadel's Children
Complete Manticore's Task Force, Following Countess Crey
Complete Numina's Task Force, Soul of the Woodsman

Task_Force_Commander.note: Hero/vigilante only. Villains and rogues can earn credit, but the badge is awarded on changing alignment.

Portal_Jockey.summary: Help Portal Corporation explore the multiverse.

badge_chain.tracks: Exploration badge in a Tina Macintyre mission
Exploration badge in a Maria Jenkins mission
Visit 3 history plaques: Founders' Falls, Brickstown (x2)
Defeat the Praetorian Earth arch-villains (Anti-Matter, Battle Maiden, Black Swan, Bobcat, Chimera, Diabolique, Dominatrix and the rest)

Portal_Jockey.note: Hero/vigilante only. Villains and rogues can earn credit, but the badge is awarded on changing alignment.

The_Atlas_Medallion.summary: Earn the might of Atlas, one of the greatest heroes of Paragon City's history.

badge_chain.tracks: Exploration badge in Atlas Park
Visit 5 history plaques: Atlas Park, Echo: Galaxy City, Kings Row (x2), Perez Park
Finish the Rescue Fortune Teller mission (from Dr. Trevor Seaborn, Hugo Redding, Haley Philips, or via Flashback)
Defeat 200 Council War Wolves
Defeat 200 Council Vampyri

The_Atlas_Medallion.note: Hero/vigilante only. The villain equivalent is the Marshal badge.

Crey_CBX-9_Pistol.summary: Expose Crey — the wiki's index states the Conspiracy Theorist badge 'Awards the Crey CBX-9 Pistol power'.

badge_chain.tracks: Exploration badge in Echo: Galaxy City
Exploration badge in Eden
Exploration badge in Independence Port
Exploration badge in Crey's Folly
Finish the 'Investigate the hacker known as The Doctor' mission for Gordon Stacy in Brickstown
Defeat 200 Crey Paragon Protectors

Crey_CBX-9_Pistol.note: Hero/vigilante only, and you must be level 30 before it unlocks — though credit accrues earlier.

Mazebreaker.wiki_title: (listed in the accolade index but has no page)
Mazebreaker.summary: Labyrinth of Fog content — the wiki lists it but does not document how to earn it.
Mazebreaker.note: Investigated, not assumed: the accolade index names it ('Mazebreaker — Awards +Max Endurance (Labyrinth of Fog Only)') but, unlike every neighbouring row, the name is UNLINKED — there is no badge page, no redirect, and the Labyrinth of Fog page does not mention it. Newer Labyrinth content the wiki has not written up yet. Needs the in-game badge window.

Toy_Bat.summary: Excalibonk — a novelty temp power, not a player-earnable accolade.
Toy_Bat.note: No wiki page and no accolade-index entry. The client's own text describes it as a Rikti Monkey novelty item rather than a badge reward, so there is very likely no 'how to acquire' to show. Listed for completeness and marked honestly.

Super_Patriot.summary: This badge is not defined in the game at this time — it cannot be earned, or even held, on a character.
Super_Patriot.note: The wiki states it outright: 'This badge is not defined at this time, which makes it impossible to even have on a character; let alone earn it.' Our roster carries the POWER record from the client bins (+5 Max End), but no obtainable badge grants it. Listed for completeness and marked honestly rather than left as a vague placeholder.

Iron_Man.summary: Earn the 1,000,000-damage badge. It shows as Adamant on heroes and vigilantes, Iron Man on male or huge villains and rogues, Ironwoman on female villains and rogues.

badge_chain.tracks: Endure 1,000,000 hit points of damage. Damage taken by pets, falling damage, self-inflicted damage, damage inside Architect Entertainment missions, and damage beyond your current health do not count.

Iron_Man.note: GAME-CORROBORATED 2026-07-16 evening (clientmessages-en.bin): the client carries the badge name 'Iron Man', its flavor text ('You are a true Iron Man…' — the same text as this accolade power's description), and Born in Battle's own requirement string lists Iron Man among its badges — so the badge is real and game-named, superseding the earlier 'not documented' verdict. The same badge also counts toward Born in Battle (villain side). STILL UNVERIFIED: whether earning the badge actually grants the +10% Max HP / +10 Max End power on Homecoming — the wiki's badge page documents no power grant, and +10/+10 would outsize every documented accolade. Joel's in-game check settles it: a character with the badge either shows the HP/End bump or does not.

MarkRecall.summary: Earn the Between Realities badge — the wiki's index states it 'Awards the Mark & Recall power'.

badge_chain.tracks: Defeat The Seed of Hamidon in First Ward
Defeat one of each of the Seedlings in the Seed of Hamidon fight
Defeat 100 points of Drudges (minion 1, lieutenant 2, boss 5)
Defeat 100 points of Carnival of Light / War / Vengeance enemies
Visit 10 history plaques

Portable_Workbench.summary: Earn the Field Crafter badge — the wiki's index states it 'Awards the Portable Workbench power'.

badge_chain.tracks: Complete the Invention tutorial
Craft 50 inventions
Craft 100 inventions
Craft 500 inventions
Craft 1000 inventions
Memorize enhancements at each level tier (Defense Debuff, To Hit Debuff, Taunt, Confuse)

Portable_Workbench.note: An Invention-system chain — no combat required.

Stolen_Immobilizer_Ray.summary: Earn the Headline Stealer badge — the wiki's index states it 'Awards the Stolen Immobilizer Ray power'.

badge_chain.tracks: Exploration badge in Bloody Bay, on top of the casino

Exploration badge in St. Martial

Stolen_Immobilizer_Ray.note: Villain/rogue only. Heroes and vigilantes can earn credit, but it is awarded on changing alignment. See the badge page for the full chain.

High_Pain_Threshold.summary: Take everything the Rogue Isles can throw at you. (Villain/rogue side — the hero equivalent is Freedom Phalanx Reserve.)

Megalomaniac.summary: Seize control of the Rogue Isles.

Force_of_Nature.summary: Make Paragon City feel your wrath.

badge_chain.tracks: Destroy 25 Hydrants, 25 Mailboxes, 25 Newspaper stands and 25 Pay phones during Mayhem Missions
Defeat 25 (non-player) Heroes
Defeat 1000 Paragon Police Department members

Geas_of_the_Kind_Ones.wiki_title: Geas of the Kind Ones Badge

Defeat the Croatoa Eochai
Defeat Sally once
Defeat 333 Red Caps

Long_Range_Teleport.summary: Collect any ten Exploration badges — the wiki states the Passport badge 'Awards the Long Range Teleporter power'.

badge_chain.tracks: Collect any ten Exploration badges. Each zone's exploration badge then unlocks that zone as a teleport destination

RIWE_Accolade_Power._key_note: the roster's key for the Elusive Mind power is RIWE_Accolade_Power (Rikti World Invasion Event); keying this 'Elusive_Mind' matched nothing and was silently ignored — caught by the orphan check
RIWE_Accolade_Power.summary: Defend against the Rikti invasions — the wiki's index states the Watchman/Watchwoman badge 'Awards the Elusive Mind power'.

badge_chain.tracks: Defeat 25 unexploded bombs (UXBs) during Rikti World Invasions
Defeat 10 Rikti Heavy Assault Suits during Rikti Invasions

RIWE_Accolade_Power.note: The badge's displayed name varies with body type (Watchman / Watchwoman). It also unlocks Rikti weapon costume options for some powersets.
